name: CSSI Evaluation Dev
postCreateCommand: eval "$(micromamba shell hook --shell=bash)" && micromamba activate base && micromamba env create -f cssi_env.yml && micromamba run -n cssi_evaluation python -m ipykernel install --user --name=cssi_evaluation --display-name='Python (cssi_evaluation)' && echo "eval '$(micromamba shell hook --shell=bash)'" >> ~/.bashrc && echo "micromamba activate cssi_evaluation" >> ~/.bashrc
